underlying_goal: Diagnose and fix why the homepage stopped working (was flickering) after an AI was given root access to the server
friction_detail: User interrupted one tool use to provide their own SSH key information directly
brief_summary: User asked Claude to fix a broken homepage caused by a Caddy/Tailscale race condition after a server reboot; Claude diagnosed the root cause, restarted the service, added a systemd dependency fix, and also added the user's laptop SSH key.
